productDisplayName: Levis Men Check Navy Blue Shirts
description: Composition Red, black and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, has half sleeves, a spread collar with a full front button placket, two chest pockets with branding on the left one, stitch detailing on the front, and a curved hem Fitting Regular 43cm Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Pait this with jeans and sneakers to complete your look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
